issues.explanation: The paragraph claims NVIDIA's 1-year price return is 48.48%, but this figure is not found in any of the cited evidence chunks. The only cited calculation (4e7134c1-290f-4b49-bb42-eed50a873427) provides the S&P 500 return of 15.04%, not NVIDIA's return. There is no source provided for the 48.48% NVIDIA figure.
issues.recommended_fix: Either cite a specific chunk or calculation that supports the 48.48% NVIDIA return figure, or remove this specific number if it cannot be verified from available evidence.
